sentence: 警方已经锁定了一名嫌疑人。
pinyin: Jǐngfāng yǐjīng suǒdìng le yī míng xiányírén.
english: The police have already identified a suspect.

sentence: 一名五岁女童在公园里走失了。
pinyin: Yī míng wǔ suì nǚtóng zài gōngyuán lǐ zǒushī le.
english: A five-year-old girl got lost in the park.

sentence: 公司今年打算雇用十名新员工。
pinyin: Gōngsī jīnnián dǎsuàn gùyòng shí míng xīn yuángōng.
english: The company plans to hire ten new employees this year.

pinyin: Tā měi wǎn shuì qián dōu huì dǎogào.
english: She prays every night before going to sleep.

sentence: 历史书里记录了许多独裁者的故事。
pinyin: Lìshǐ shū lǐ jìlù le xǔduō dúcáizhě de gùshi.
english: History books record the stories of many dictators.
